unchangedJobs.description: Data Engineer Careers Data Engineer Share this job: Data EngineerData Engineercorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000116466158&jobName=Data%20Engineer The Company At lastminute.com, we live for the holidays. We are the European Travel-Tech leader in Dynamic Holiday Packages. With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world. Job Description We are looking for a Data Engineer to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are passionate about using data to improve business performance, enjoy challenging projects and are skilled at data modeling, keep on reading, as you might be the perfect fit for this job. The job in brief: Job Title - Data EngineerWorking model - hybrid in ChiassoTeam - you will join the Data Analytics TeamLevel – ProfessionalLocation - Chiasso, SwitzerlandContract - Permanent – full-time (36 h/week) What your impact will be:Architect & Build: Design, develop, and maintain robust and scalable data pipelines and architectures on Google Cloud Platform (GCP).Innovate: Champion new approaches and technologies, leveraging AI to optimize data processes and generate deeper insights.Collaborate: Partner closely with internal and business stakeholders to understand their data needs, translating requirements into effective technical solutions.Prioritize: Manage competing demands and strategically prioritize projects to deliver maximum business value.Ensure Quality: Guarantee the performance, reliability, and scalability of our data systems through rigorous testing and maintenance. Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Data Location: Chiasso, Switzerland Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now Qualifications Your expertise:Experience: At least 6 years of experience as a data engineer, with a proven track record of building and maintaining production-grade data systems.Cloud Expertise: Strong knowledge of SQL and hands-on experience with cloud-based Big Data platforms like Google BigQuery.ETL/ELT: Expertise in data modeling and developing and maintaining data transformation pipelines using tools like dbt.Orchestration: Experience with workflow management engines such as Airflow.Automatization: Use Terraform/AWS CloudFormation to manage and automate the provisioning and configuration of cloud infrastructure.Programming: Proficiency in at least one programming language, with a strong preference for Python.Communication: Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to influence technical and non-technical stakeholders. Desirable: Visualization: Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Qlik, Tableau, Looker, or Power BI.Extract and Process: Develop and implement solutions to scrape and extract data from various sources and transform it into a usable format.Domain Knowledge: Previous experience in the travel, digital, or e-commerce industries.Analytical Skills: A strong understanding of data analysis principles and how to apply them to improve business outcomes. Additional Information Perks of working with us:How we work together:An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on FridaysFlexible start and end of the working day, with core hours from 10:00 to 4:00 pmPossibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulationsHow we learn together:Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training contentOther perks:2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposesOccasional social events to foster connections among colleaguesTravel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff faresWe support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws.Wish you were here? We do, too!Selection process steps*:HR interview1st Manager Interview (30 minutes)2nd Manager Interview + Technical Test (1 hour)Offer extended (*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview)Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belongingAt the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility. We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here. We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation. We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel.Eligibility criteria: By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status. Back to Job Search

unchangedJobs.description: Client Affiliation Partner Careers Client Affiliation Partner Share this job: Client Affiliation PartnerClient Affiliation Partnercorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000116463807&jobName=Client%20Affiliation%20Partner The Company At lastminute.com, we live for the holidays. We are the European Travel-Tech leader in Dynamic Holiday Packages. With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world. Job Description We are looking for a dynamic and data-driven Client Affiliation Partner to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide and help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers.If you are passionate about digital performance and the tech industry, with solid experience in affiliate marketing and a strong analytical mindset, keep on reading, you might be the perfect fit for this role.You will be responsible for managing and optimizing our affiliate marketing programs, developing strong relationships with partners, and analyzing performance data to maximize ROI. This is a great opportunity for a results-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment and has a passion for the travel industry.You will join our Partnership Affiliation Team, a challenging yet exciting business area, where your capabilities, efforts, and market intuition will directly contribute to the growth of our programs, especially across US and international markets. The job in brief: Job Title – Client Affiliation Partner Working model – hybrid in Chiasso Team – you will join the Partnership Affiliation Team within the Marketing Department Level – Professional Location – Chiasso, Switzerland Contract – Permanent, full time (36 h/week)What your impact will be:Affiliate Program Management: Oversee and optimize the performance of existing affiliates, ensuring alignment with business goals.Partner Acquisition & Relationship Management: Identify, recruit, and onboard new affiliate partners while nurturing strong relationships with existing ones.Performance Analysis: Track, analyze, and report on key metrics, providing actionable insights to improve affiliate performance.Optimization & Growth: Develop strategies to increase revenue, engagement, and conversion rates within the affiliate network.Negotiation & Contracting: Manage commercial negotiations with partners, ensuring competitive agreements that benefit both parties.Market Research: Stay up to date with industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging affiliate marketing strategies.Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams, including marketing, product, and finance, to ensure a seamless partnership experience.Compliance & Fraud Prevention: Monitor traffic sources and ensure all affiliate activities comply with company policies and guidelines. Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Marketing & Media Location: Chiasso, Switzerland Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now Qualifications Your expertise:Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, or a related field.2+ years of experience in affiliate marketing, account management, or performance marketing.Strong analytical skills with proficiency in data analysis tools (Google Analytics, Excel, or other BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Qlik).Excellent negotiation and relationship-building skills.Knowledge of affiliate marketing platforms (e.g., CJ Affiliate, Awin, Rakuten, or similar).Experience with online travel agencies (OTAs) or e-commerce is a plus.Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced, results-driven environment.Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, in English (additional languages are a plus).Self-motivated, proactive, and detail-oriented mindset.Desirable:Experience working on the US market.Exposure to platforms such as Travelpayouts or Stay22.Knowledge of additional acquisition channels (retargeting, display, SEM). Additional Information Perks of working with us:How we work together:An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on FridaysFlexible start and end of the working dayPossibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulationsHow we learn together:Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time.Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training contentOther perks:2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposesOccasional social events to foster connections among colleaguesTravel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff faresWe support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws.Wish you were here? We do, too! Selection process steps*:HR interview (10-30 minutes)1st interview (Manager): soft skills + technical knowledgeBusiness case2nd interview meeting with the DirectorOffer extended(*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview)Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging:At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility. We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here. We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation. We are the European Travel-Tech leader in Dynamic Holiday Packages. With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world. Job Description We are looking for a Software Engineer – Microservices & ETLs to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are passionate about building scalable microservices, developing robust APIs, and modernizing data integration workflows, keep on reading, you might be the perfect fit for this role. The job in brief: Job Title - Software EngineerWorking model - hybrid from ChiassoTeam - you will join the Finance Systems Engineering teamLevel - Professional Location - Chiasso, Switzerland Contract - Permanent – full-time (36 h/week) What your impact will be:Modernize legacy processes: Gradually transition monolithic ETL workflows toward a microservices-based ecosystem, identifying opportunities to reduce technical debt.Develop microservices: Design, write, and test high-quality software using practices such as TDD, DDD, Clean Code, and SOLID principles.Support data infrastructure: Maintain and optimize existing ETL pipelines built with Talend 7/8, ensuring full business continuity through effective KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On) activities.Automate Finance operations: Collaborate closely with Finance stakeholders to understand their needs and deliver solutions that automate manual or recurring processes. Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Technology Location: Chiasso, Switzerland Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now Qualifications Your expertise:1+ years of experience in software development, with hands-on experience using an OO/FP language — preferably Java or KotlinUnderstanding of microservices architecture, REST API design patterns, and backend developmentSolid SQL skills and previous experience working with relational databases (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL, or similar)Previous experience with ETL tools or data integration platforms (Talend, Informatica, SSIS, or similar)Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional, multilingual environment, translating business requirements into technical solutions and sharing knowledge with peers Desirable:Background in financial systems, e-commerce, or the travel industryExperience specifically with Talend 7 or Talend 8Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practicesExperience using Git and version control workflowsPrevious experience with Clean Code, SOLID principles, and an Agile mindsetExperience working with the Spring/Spring Boot ecosystem Additional Information Perks of working with us:How we work together:An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities)Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on FridaysFlexible start and end of the working day, with core hours from 10:00 to 4:00 pmPossibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined time.Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform
